title: The YouTube Mod
description: This mod adds YouTube and play buttons to Minecraft. It also adds many other features, such as a Laptop, Telephone, and Bank.
body:
This mod adds YouTube and play buttons to Minecraft. It also adds a bunch of other stuff like a Laptop, a Bank and a Telephone.
## Laptop Crafting Recipe
![Laptop Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2ee3af738a474a72560dd84668d90d33b04b81d5_0.webp)
## Telephone Crafting Recipe
